title: Update testimonial dates to January 2026 and add service photos to Services section

requirements.summary: Update all testimonial dates in Testimonials.tsx so that the most recent reviews are dated up to January 2026, distributing dates realistically across 2025 and early 2026 while keeping all other review content unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: At least one testimonial is dated January 2026
Dates span across 2025 and early 2026 (no dates earlier than 2024)
All other review fields (name, location, rating, text, service type) remain intact
Date formatting remains consistent with the existing style

file_operations.description: Update the date values for all testimonials in the testimonials array. Distribute dates realistically across 2025 and early 2026, ensuring at least one testimonial is dated January 2026. Keep all other fields (name, location, rating, service, review text) completely unchanged. Maintain the existing date format.

requirements.summary: Replace the icon/square placeholder in each service card within Services.tsx with a relevant illustrative photo from frontend/public/assets/generated, ensuring each of the six service cards displays a dedicated photo with descriptive French alt text
acceptanceCriteria: Each service card displays a photo image instead of the icon/square
Six distinct photos are used, one per service type
Each image has a descriptive French alt attribute matching the service type
Card layout remains visually consistent and responsive across desktop and mobile
Images are properly sized and cropped to fit the card (e.g., object-cover)

file_operations.description: Replace the icon/square placeholder in each service card with an element loading the corresponding photo from frontend/public/assets/generated. Use the following exact file paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/service-refection-toiture.dim_800x500.png (for réfection de toiture), frontend/public/assets/generated/service-pose-tuiles.dim_800x500.png (for pose de tuiles), frontend/public/assets/generated/service-reparation.dim_800x500.png (for réparation), frontend/public/assets/generated/service-isolation.dim_800x500.png (for isolation), frontend/public/assets/generated/service-zinguerie.dim_800x500.png (for zinguerie), and frontend/public/assets/generated/service-nettoyage.dim_800x500.png (for nettoyage et traitement). Apply appropriate CSS classes (e.g., object-cover, rounded) to ensure images fit the card layout consistently. Add a descriptive French alt attribute for each image matching the service type (e.g., 'Réfection complète de toiture'). Ensure the card layout remains responsive across desktop and mobile viewports.
